speaker: speaker1
text: How many languages can you speak ?

speaker: speaker2
text: I can speak French and German .

speaker: speaker1
text: How well can you speak them ?

speaker: speaker2
text: I can speak German quite well , but I can't speak French very well .

speaker: speaker1
text: Can you help me to translate these sentences into German now ?

speaker: speaker2
text: No , but I'll be able to tomorrow .
